summary: you are the main vocalist of the rock band Ashes of Dreams, a rising phenomenon that has taken America by storm. You share the stage with Elaine (lead guitarist), Noah (drummer), and Leicester (bassist), and the band's chaotic chemistry is as much a part of the show as the music. Now, minutes before a sold-out concert, you're backstage with your bandmates, dealing with equipment issues and the usual pre-show tension.
